articles.title: 3 killed in tourist helicopter crash on the Hawaiian island of Kauai
articles.description:
The helicopter was carrying one pilot and four passengers when it crashed Thursday afternoon at Kalalau Beach.

The post 3 killed in tourist helicopter crash on the Hawaiian island of Kauai appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Three individuals died in a helicopter crash at Kalalau Beach, Kauai.
The helicopter was carrying one pilot and four passengers during the incident.
Boston residents traveling to Hawaii should be aware of increased safety concerns.

articles.title: Ad Club’s Women’s Leadership Forum stays alive amid DEI pushback
articles.description:
The annual event, aimed at building connections among women in businesses, has adapted to the shifting corporate climate.

The post Ad Club’s Women’s Leadership Forum stays alive amid DEI pushback appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Ad Club's Women's Leadership Forum continues to support women in business amid DEI challenges.
The annual event fosters connections among women, adapting to corporate climate changes.
Boston businesses benefit from enhanced networking opportunities and support for women leaders.

articles.title: Juvenile injured in Allston shooting
articles.description:
No arrests have been made, police said.

The post Juvenile injured in Allston shooting appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A juvenile was injured in a shooting in Allston on March 27.
No arrests have been made, raising community safety concerns.
Residents are urged to stay vigilant amid increasing gun violence.
